sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n8689" key="a)nqairetisth/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀνθαιρ-ετιστής</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">οῦ</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, of planets, <sense id="n8689.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">belonging to the opposite 'condition',</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Jul.Laod.</author> </bibl> in <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">Cat.Cod.Astr.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">5(1).183.21</biblScope></bibl>, cf. <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">192.36</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
